name: Bouillabaisse #3
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam mussels for 3-4 minutes.
2. Dissolve saffron in warm wine; set aside.
3. Melt butter; add garlic, onion, carrot, celery, seasonings, and soy sauce. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Add water and wine; bring to boiling. Add fish. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Serve with toasted bread.
